reason: The canonical queue contains no active frontier_research item. Additive queue history showed R-009 completed, so this records the next non-duplicative completed slice without overwriting shared state.

proposed_item.action: Distinguish AudioContext interruption from suspension and require post-recovery render progress before claiming browser-path recovery.

progress.finding: The 2026-07-13 Web Audio 1.1 editor draft defines interrupted as a distinct AudioContextState. A running state or resolved resume promise is insufficient recovery evidence unless render position advances afterward.
progress.verification: 6 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical committed logic.

proposed_item.handoff: Vercel Studio should capture AudioContext.state at failure, on statechange, and after recovery, then pair the classifier result with render-position advance and the existing R-008 evidence fusion. Do not infer or retain the private cause of an interruption.
